scenario.goal: A previously sent unlock command is replayed at the device boundary, this time without an idempotency key.
scenario.oracle: state-check: an external device side effect cannot be admitted without a predeclared idempotency key
success_criteria: a replayed actuation lacking an idempotency key is not admitted
risk_traps: a resent command double-actuates a physical device because no dedup key was required

attack.description: A captured device command is re-injected. beaterOS requires every external side effect to predeclare an idempotency key so the executor can dedup retries and replays. This replay omits the key, so admission denies it before any actuation can occur.

manifest.inputs_summary: Re-send the earlier front-door unlock command.
manifest.human_explanation: Resend the unlock command that appeared to fail.
